```mermaid

    style 2 fill:#1168bd,stroke:#0b4884,color:#ffffff

    style 20 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 21 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 22 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 23 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 24 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 25 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

Containers<br />documented in<br />alunduil-chezmoi (issue<br />#202).</div>"]
    style 26 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 28 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 40 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 42 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff
